conversations.content: Let's do an Azerothian legal knowledge Q&A to test your understanding of the legal provisions.
Please answer using the previously mentioned Azerothian legal system: How many days will you be imprisoned for repeatedly destroying a mushroom mycelium blanket in a Sporeggar village in Zangarmarsh?

<function>memory_query_call</function><content>Number of days imprisoned for repeatedly destroying a mushroom mycelium blanket in a Sporeggar village in Zangarmarsh under the previously mentioned Azerothian legal system</content>

Related memory fragment: [mem-id:622] Time: 2025-08-26-10:30, Content: The user taught the Azeroth Zangarmarsh Ecological Protection Law, the core of which is that those who destroy the mushroom mycelium blankets of Sporeggar villages will be placed in confinement for twenty days, ordered to plant an equal area of mushrooms on the edge of the marsh, and simultaneously fined 50 gold coins. If destroyed multiple times, the imprisonment is extended to ninety days and permanently prohibited from entering the marsh. Applicable to the surroundings of all Sporeggar settlements. Low relevance memory fragments: None.

conversations.think: There is 1 related entry mentioned in the memory. [mem-id:622] clearly states ninety days of confinement for multiple times. The user only asked how many days they will be imprisoned, so I only need to answer the number of days.
conversations.content: According to the Azerothian world legal system, repeatedly destroying a mushroom mycelium blanket in a Sporeggar village in Zangarmarsh will result in ninety days of confinement.
Correct! You have mastered this legal rule.
